name: The Drunken Brawler
description: A massive, soot-stained laborer slams his tankard onto the table and glares at you. 'You! You're the one who was lookin' at my brother funny, ain't ya?'

initial.text: He's drunk, angry, and looking for a reason to swing.

choices.label: [Influence 14] 'You've had one too many, friend. Let me buy the next round.'
[Resolve] Sit down before I sit you down.

intimidate-check.text: You hold his gaze and let your hand drift toward your weapon.
intimidate-check.failure_text: He grins through broken teeth. 'You think you scare me, stranger?'

monk-knockout.text: In a blur of movement, you tap a point on his neck. He collapses instantly and silently. The tavern barely notices.

calm-down.text: He blinks, his anger fading into a bleary grin as you slide him a fresh tankard. 'Aye... maybe I did. You're a good sort!'

scare-off.text: He looks at your steady hand and cold eyes, then mutters an apology and stumbles back to his seat.

start-fight.text: 'That's it!' he roars, swinging a wild haymaker.

fight-aftermath.text: The brawler crashes to the floor. The other patrons give you a wide berth.
